characters.name: LIISA
characters.description: Väike inimene, tüdruk. Kandmas sooja roosat talvejopet, siniseid pükse, roosat mütsi ja roosasid kindaid. Tal on suured rõõmsameelsed silmad ja naeratav näoilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

characters.name: PEETER
characters.description: Väike inimene, poiss. Kandmas sooja sinist talvejopet, rohelisi pükse, sinist mütsi ja siniseid kindaid. Tal on suured uudishimulikud silmad ja naeratav näoilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

locations.name: Lumepark
locations.description: A vast, serene snowy park on a bright winter day. The ground is completely covered in fresh, soft white snow. Scattered bare deciduous trees with delicate branches are visible, covered in a light dusting of snow, and in the distance, a line of frosty green pine trees. A gentle slope is visible in the background. The sky is a clear, light blue with a soft, warm winter sunlight illuminating the scene. The atmosphere is peaceful and inviting. Cartoon style.

pages.scene: Liisa and Peeter are standing in a vast snowy park, looking around with bright, happy expressions. The ground is covered in fresh white snow. Bare trees are visible in the background. Liisa wears a pink winter jacket, blue pants, pink hat and mittens. Peeter wears a blue winter jacket, green pants, blue hat and mittens. Clear blue sky with soft sunlight. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Peeter are pointing excitedly at the vast amount of fresh, soft white snow around them in the park. They both have wide smiles. Liisa wears a pink winter jacket, blue pants, pink hat and mittens. Peeter wears a blue winter jacket, green pants, blue hat and mittens. Bare trees and distant pine trees in the background. Clear blue sky with soft sunlight. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Peeter are kneeling on the snowy ground in the park, pushing a small snowball to make it bigger. They are working together and smiling. Liisa wears a pink winter jacket, blue pants, pink hat and mittens. Peeter wears a blue winter jacket, green pants, blue hat and mittens. Bare trees in the background. Clear blue sky with soft sunlight. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Peeter are standing next to a noticeably larger snowball they have rolled, continuing to push it through the snow. They look determined and happy. Liisa wears a pink winter jacket, blue pants, pink hat and mittens. Peeter wears a blue winter jacket, green pants, blue hat and mittens. Bare trees in the background. Clear blue sky with soft sunlight. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Peeter are now standing near a large base snowball. Peeter is kneeling and starting to roll a new, smaller snowball, while Liisa is starting to roll an even smaller one nearby. They are focused and smiling. Liisa wears a pink winter jacket, blue pants, pink hat and mittens. Peeter wears a blue winter jacket, green pants, blue hat and mittens. Bare trees in the background. Clear blue sky with soft sunlight. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Peeter are carefully lifting a medium-sized snowball on top of the largest snowball, forming the base of a snowman. They are concentrating. Liisa wears a pink winter jacket, blue pants, pink hat and mittens. Peeter wears a blue winter jacket, green pants, blue hat and mittens. Bare trees in the background. Clear blue sky with soft sunlight. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Peeter are now carefully lifting the smallest snowball to place it on top of the two stacked snowballs, completing the snowman's body. They look excited. Liisa wears a pink winter jacket, blue pants, pink hat and mittens. Peeter wears a blue winter jacket, green pants, blue hat and mittens. Bare trees in the background. Clear blue sky with soft sunlight. Cartoon style.

Liisa is carefully placing a red hat on the snowman's head, while Peeter is wrapping a green scarf around its neck. They are decorating their snowman. Liisa wears a pink winter jacket, blue pants, pink hat and mittens. Peeter wears a blue winter jacket, green pants, blue hat and mittens. The snowman is clearly visible, made of three stacked snowballs. Bare trees in the background. Clear blue sky with soft sunlight. Cartoon style.

Liisa is placing two small black stones for the snowman's eyes, and Peeter is gently pushing a carrot into the snowman's face for a nose. A small row of pebbles forms its mouth. Liisa wears a pink winter jacket, blue pants, pink hat and mittens. Peeter wears a blue winter jacket, green pants, blue hat and mittens. The snowman now has a hat, scarf, eyes, nose, and mouth. Bare trees in the background. Clear blue sky with soft sunlight. Cartoon style.

Liisa and Peeter are standing proudly next to their completed, cheerful snowman, which has a red hat, green scarf, stone eyes, a carrot nose, and a pebble mouth. They are both smiling broadly at their creation. Liisa wears a pink winter jacket, blue pants, pink hat and mittens. Peeter wears a blue winter jacket, green pants, blue hat and mittens. Bare trees and a snowy landscape are visible in the background. Clear blue sky with soft sunlight. Cartoon style.
